shortRest.summary: Spend Hit Dice to regain HP; many class features recharge on a short rest.

hitDice.note: Player chooses which dice to expend; roll die + Con mod per die spent.

longRest.summary: Regain all lost HP, half spent Hit Dice (min 1), spell slots, and many features; reduces Exhaustion by 1.

classFeatureHooks.note: Class-specific resets (Ki, Wild Shape, etc.) reference feature ids on the character sheet; not enumerated here.
